recommendation.rationale: Matrix cell risk_medium__criticality_high maps to default recommendation 'pr_only'. Risk is medium and business criticality is high. Criticality evidence: data_sensitivity=0.75, privilege_level=1.00, internet_exposure=0.75, matched_signals=none. Relationship context is incomplete, so the recommendation remains conservative and advisory unless policy overrides it. Current execution surfaces stay PR-only, so this recommendation remains advisory until the reviewed bundle is applied.

strategies.decision_rationale: Compatibility resolver defaulted to the compatible profile 's3_account_block_public_access_pr_bundle' for strategy 's3_account_block_public_access_pr_bundle'.

strategies.impact_text: All four account-level public access block settings will be enabled.
strategies.label: Enable account-level S3 Block Public Access (PR bundle)
warnings: Review workloads that intentionally rely on public bucket policies before apply.
